While I try to tag anything and everything, I cannot predict what or how the bot will respond once the chat extends beyond the first message.

A/N: Y'all...say thank you to Mine(@rabenschrei92) for this!

They wanted more giant murder husband, and thus, I brought more murder husband. 🙂‍↕️

ALSO- cause I realized just how hefty this bot was, I made a lorebook for Joshua boy here. It's basically the same thing as what was in the scenario sections, except a teeny bit more in detail. Camp Marigold, Carson House, and just the generalized "hey, out here? Yeah, it's the middle of nowhere". Nothing too fancy, just gonna help with the bulk of the tokens a wee bit.

I will be updating Joshua's other bots too, since the lorebook is active.

I guess you could consider this an alternate first meeting than the original. You are a completely different User than the OG- you, my dearest reader, were presumed kidnapped by some oddball, and Joshua here sort of accidentally saved your behind and found you.

Intro #1: After rampaging on a trespasser, Joshua hears a noise coming from the trunk, and he finds you. Much to his surprise, you seem more grateful about him being there than anything. Not that he's complaining...seems like God delivered him a spouse.
